subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! I beseech Thee by Thy Name through which the heaven of Thy Cause was raised up, and from whose horizon the sun shone forth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک اللهم یا الهی اسئلک باسمک الذی به رفعت سماء امرک و اشرقت عن افقها شمس
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @prayer for victory and requital; triumph of the Cause, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @prayer for protection, @prayer for the spiritual progress of others
